name: docketra
description: Task & Case Management System - Backend API

scripts.test:integrity: node tests/health.controller.test.js && node tests/adminIntegrity.test.js && node tests/firmRbac.test.js && node tests/writeSafety.test.js && node tests/requestLifecycle.test.js && node tests/sideEffectQueue.test.js && node tests/backgroundJobs.test.js && node tests/circuitBreaker.test.js && node tests/softDelete.test.js && node tests/caseStateMachine.test.js && node tests/caseSla.service.test.js && node tests/caseSlaConcurrency.test.js && node tests/diagnostics.service.test.js && node tests/migrationEncryptFields.test.js && node tests/docketLifecycleWorkflow.test.js && node tests/docketAuditIntegrity.test.js && node tests/user.controller.getUserById.test.js && node tests/controllerDecomposition.service.test.js
scripts.test:security: node tests/securityHardening.test.js && node tests/coreSecurityHardeningPhase2.test.js && node tests/csrfOrigin.middleware.test.js && node tests/authSession.refreshAccessToken.test.js && node tests/authMiddleware.readOnly.test.js && node tests/user.serialization.privacy.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:pure && npm run test:integration
scripts.ci:backend:core: npm run test:integrity:pure && npm run test:tenant-identity-boundary && npm run test:admin-tenant-boundary
scripts.ci:backend:security: npm run validate:env:test && npm run validate:env:production && npm run test:security:pure && npm run test:hardening:pure
scripts.ci:release-gate: npm run ci:release-gate:pure && npm run ci:release-gate:integration
scripts.test:tenant-identity-boundary: REDIS_URL='' ALLOW_REDIS_FALLBACK='true' sh -c "node tests/storageTenantOwnershipBoundary.test.js && node tests/tenantStorageOwnershipBoundary.test.js && node tests/storageAuditOwnershipFirmId.test.js && node tests/aiMissingOwnershipFailsClosed.test.js && node tests/firmContext.authTenantContext.test.js"
scripts.test:byos: node tests/storageStateNormalization.test.js && node tests/storageNormalizationRegression.test.js && node tests/storageProviderFactoryState.test.js && node tests/storageController.providerAgnosticRuntime.test.js && node tests/docketFileStorage.service.test.js && node tests/storageProviderResolutionPath.test.js && node tests/s3ProviderObjectKeyNormalization.test.js && node tests/googleDriveProvider.uploadFileCompatibility.test.js && node tests/byosRegressionSecurityAudit.test.js
scripts.test:auth-pilot-smoke: node tests/authPilotReadinessSmoke.test.js && node tests/authForgotPasswordOtpReliability.test.js && node tests/authLoginCookieFlow.test.js && node tests/superadminPilotSessionSmoke.test.js && node tests/authSuperadminRouteRegression.test.js
scripts.test:pilot-readiness: npm run ci:backend:routes && npm run test:auth-pilot-smoke && npm run test:tenant-identity-boundary && npm run test:admin-tenant-boundary && npm run test:pure && npm run ci:frontend:build && npm run ci:frontend:checks
scripts.test:pilot-readiness:integration: npm run test:pilot-readiness && npm run test:integrity:integration
scripts.test:integrity:pure: REDIS_URL='' ALLOW_REDIS_FALLBACK='true' sh -c "node tests/health.controller.test.js && node tests/firmRbac.test.js && node tests/writeSafety.test.js && node tests/requestLifecycle.test.js && node tests/sideEffectQueue.test.js && node tests/backgroundJobs.test.js && node tests/circuitBreaker.test.js && node tests/softDelete.test.js && node tests/caseStateMachine.test.js && node tests/caseSla.service.test.js && node tests/caseSlaConcurrency.test.js && node tests/diagnostics.service.test.js && node tests/docketLifecycleWorkflow.test.js && node tests/docketAuditIntegrity.test.js && node tests/user.controller.getUserById.test.js && node tests/controllerDecomposition.service.test.js"
scripts.test:security:pure: NODE_ENV='test' REDIS_URL='' ALLOW_REDIS_FALLBACK='true' sh -c "node tests/coreSecurityHardeningPhase2.test.js && node tests/csrfOrigin.middleware.test.js && node tests/authSession.refreshAccessToken.test.js && node tests/authMiddleware.readOnly.test.js && node tests/user.serialization.privacy.test.js"
scripts.test:hardening:pure: NODE_ENV='test' REDIS_URL='' ALLOW_REDIS_FALLBACK='true' sh -c "node tests/requestId.middleware.test.js && node tests/productionHardening.test.js && node tests/backendRuntimeEntrypoints.smoke.test.js"
scripts.test:pure: REDIS_URL='' ALLOW_REDIS_FALLBACK='true' NODE_ENV='test' sh -c "npm run test:integrity:pure && npm run test:security:pure && npm run test:hardening:pure && npm run test:tenant-identity-boundary && npm run test:admin-tenant-boundary && node tests/fileUtils.test.js && node tests/reports.controller.test.js && node tests/superadminPilotReadiness.helpers.test.js"
scripts.ci:release-gate:pure: npm run docs:check && npm run ci:backend:syntax && npm run ci:backend:routes && npm run ci:backend:core && npm run ci:backend:security && npm run ci:frontend:build && npm run ci:frontend:checks
scripts.ci:release-gate:integration: npm run ci:backend:core:integration && npm run ci:backend:security:integration
scripts.test:pilot-hardening: node tests/pilotHardeningScriptContract.test.js && npm run ci:backend:routes && node tests/pilotRouteSchemaAudit.test.js && node tests/frontendBackendApiParity.test.js && npm --prefix ui run test:pilot-ui-contracts && npm run test:pilot-launch-readiness && npm run test:task-manager-launch-readiness
scripts.ci:backend:deploy-safety: NODE_ENV='production' UPLOAD_SCAN_STRICT='true' REDIS_URL='' ALLOW_REDIS_FALLBACK='true' JWT_SECRET='aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa' STORAGE_TOKEN_SECRET='bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb' METRICS_TOKEN='cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc' sh -c "npm run validate:env:production && npm run validate:env:test && node tests/routeValidationContract.test.js && node tests/backendRuntimeEntrypoints.smoke.test.js"
